{{Infobox character
| name = Mua Krakal
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mua Krakal]] is a young [[Visiri]] duelist with the purple eye.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mua Krakal]] uses force-blades.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mua Krakal]] has burns from a fight with [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mua Krakal]] has a purple-red aura.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
